title: banksia integrifolia var. oblongifolia
intro: Banksia integrifolia var. oblongifolia, also known as the large-fruited banksia, is a variety of the coast banksia plant, a tall, evergreen shrub native to eastern Australia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Banksia integrifolia var. oblongifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
